sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6209" key="a)/n3" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄν</orth> (C) or <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀν</orth>, Epic form of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀνά,</foreign> q. <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> </entryFree>
